services.question: What software services does Novyra offer?
services.answer: We specialize in building advanced web applications (SaaS), premium corporate platforms, custom AI systems, and digital system design (UI/UX) using cutting-edge technologies to ensure speed and security.

duration.question: How long does it typically take to complete a software project?
duration.answer: The duration varies based on complexity; premium corporate websites take 2 to 4 weeks, while large-scale software systems and custom web applications are divided into sprints spanning 1 to 3 months with continuous delivery.

support.question: Do you provide technical support and maintenance after website delivery?
support.answer: Absolutely. All our projects come with a free technical support period and quality assurance (QA Passed), plus flexible monthly maintenance plans for system upgrades, performance monitoring, and periodic data protection.

tech-stack.question: What are the core technologies used in your projects?
tech-stack.answer: We primarily rely on modern, ultra-fast software architectures like Next.js and React 19, with Tailwind CSS styling, Framer Motion animations, and advanced cloud databases that ensure high flexibility and full responsiveness.
